payload.answer: There is a conflict between the existing memory “Sara is my daughter” and the new input “Sara is my niece.” I cannot decide which relationship is correct without your confirmation. You can choose one of the safe actions: approve_supersession to replace the existing daughter relationship with the niece relationship, keep_both if both statements should remain because they refer to different Saras or there is another explanation, reject_new to keep only the existing daughter relationship and not save the niece statement, or edit to clarify the correct relationship or distinguish between people.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to Sara, which may be the same person as the existing Sara, but the relationship conflicts: daughter versus niece.

details: Conflict requires user choice before committing the new relationship.
